title: The Room Upstairs
writer: Pierre-René Wolf, Pierre Véry, Georges Lacombe
actors: Marlene Dietrich, Jean Gabin, Jean d'Yd
plot: The local building contractor Martin Roumagnac is fascinated by the fashionable Blanche Ferrand. To impress Blanche, Martin presents her with a villa. However, this ruins him financially. Despite Martin's many efforts for the femm...
